---
title: "Materials"
execute:
  freeze: auto
---

This bootcamp coordinates resources built as individual courses. The [schedule](schedule.qmd) will orient you to the relevant course subject and module.

| Course | Type | Website |
|--------|------|---------|
| Anatomic Analyses | MRI | [Site](https://nmuncy.github.io/course-mri_anat/) |
| Computational Foundations | Technical | [Site](https://nmuncy.github.io/course-basic_bash/) |
